calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Triet M. Nguyen, Telephone 415-937-2099, appearing on his own behalf as Pro Per Defendant;
No other appearance.

Mr. Nguyen was assisted by an interperter which he brought to court for his behalf.

At the beginning of today's hearing, the Court address Mr. Nguyen and inquires if it is his understanding that in regards to his Claim of Exemption, that the sheriff is not holding any funds, earnings or a wage garnishment or earnings withholding order or have not seized any funds, at least as of the date this was prepared, December 28, 2018. Mr. Nguyen through his personal interperter answer yes. There was no appearance by the creditor Cavalry SPV I LLC.

The Court makes the following ruling:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK N.A. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is taken off calender.

The court will prepare an order

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
